hotels.name: Estuary Lodge Motel
hotels.description_fr:
Estuary Lodge Motel is located in the quiet village of Talsarnau, in Snowdonia national park, within 5 miles of the coast. The property is conveniently located for guests visiting Mount Snowdon, Portmeirion, the Ffestiniog steam railway and Llechwedd slate caverns for world famous zip rides.

The Estuary Lodge has 8 en suite rooms, all of which are located on the ground floor. Rooms are individually decorated with luxurious fabrics and natural colours, and each has a flat-screen TV, work desk and tea/coffee facilities.

The Motel is ideally located for exploring Snowdonia’s mountains and coast, and the staff are happy to advise on attractions and walks in the local areas. The nearest shops are less than 2 miles away.

hotels.name: Harlech Apartments - Efnisien
hotels.description_fr:
L’hébergement Harlech Apartments - Efnisien se trouve à Harlech, à respectivement 13 km et 38 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Portmeirion et Snowdon. Vous pourrez pratiquer le golf dans les environs. Cet hébergement est installé à 1,6 km de : Plage de Harlech. Vous pourrez profiter d’une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et d’un parking privé disponible sur place.
Cette maison de vacances comporte 1 chambre, une cuisine avec un réfrigérateur et un micro-ondes, ainsi que 1 salle de bains avec une douche et un sèche-cheveux.
Vous séjournerez à 44 km de ce lieu d’intérêt : Chemin de fer à crémaillère Snowdon Mountain Railway.
Les couples apprécient particulièrement l'emplacement de cet établissement. Ils lui donnent la note de 10 pour un séjour à deux.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Living Space: Harlech Apartments - Efnisien in Harlech offers a cosy holiday home with one bedroom and one bathroom. The property features a fully equipped kitchen, a seating area, and a dining space.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, a hairdryer, refrigerator, microwave, stovetop, and a shower. The apartment includes a wardrobe for added convenience.
Convenient Location: Harlech Beach is a 19-minute walk away. Nearby attractions include Portmeirion (13 km), Snowdon (38 km), and Snowdon Mountain Railway (44 km). Golfing opportunities are available.
Parking and Reception: Paid on-site private parking is provided. Reception staff speak English.
Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 10 for a two-person trip.
hotels.description_es:
Harlech Apartments - Efnisien se encuentra en Harlech, a 13 km de Portmeirion y a 38 km de Snowdon, en una zona donde se puede practicar golf. Este alojamiento está a 19 min a pie de Playa de Harlech y ofrece wifi gratis y parking privado en el propio alojamiento.
La casa o chalet cuenta con 1 dormitorio, una cocina con nevera y microondas, y 1 baño con ducha y secador de pelo.
Snowdon Mountain Railway está a 44 km del alojamiento.
A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 10 para viajes de dos personas.

L’hébergement Carreg Wen vous accueille à respectivement 12 km et 36 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Portmeirion et Snowdon. Il propose une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et un jardin. Cette maison de vacances possède un parking privé gratuit et se trouve dans une région où vous pourrez pratiquer des activités telles que le golf, la pêche et le vélo.

Cette maison de vacances comprend 4 chambres, une télévision, une cuisine équipée avec un réfrigérateur et un lave-vaisselle, un lave-linge, ainsi que 2 salles de bains avec une douche.

Vous séjournerez à 43 km de ce lieu d’intérêt : Chemin de fer à crémaillère Snowdon Mountain Railway. L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Liverpool John Lennon) est à 146 km.

Guests can enjoy golfing, fishing, and cycling nearby. Portmeirion is 12 km away, Snowdon Mountain Railway 43 km, and Snowdon 36 km. Liverpool John Lennon Airport is 146 km from the property.

hotels.name: Black Rock House
hotels.description_fr:
This beautiful Victorian villa has sea views. It is now a 5-star boutique guest house with free Wi-Fi and luxury rooms with digital TV, DVD players and toiletries.
Black Rock House is the first guest accommodation in Hastings and St Leonards-on-Sea to be given 5 stars with a Gold award. It is less than 500 metres from Hastings Rail Station and close to the beach, Alexandra Park and the Old Town.
Black Rock House has been beautifully restored and mixes original character with modern style and luxury.
The individually designed rooms are large and light, with luxury beds, mini-fridges and tea/coffee. The modern en suite bathrooms have powerful showers, luxury toiletries and bathrobes.

hotels.name: West Hill Retreat Seaview Balcony Loft Apartment & Free Offstreet Parking
hotels.description_fr:
Offrant une vue sur la mer, l’hébergement West Hill Retreat Seaview Balcony Loft Apartment & Free Offstreet Parking possède une terrasse et un balcon, à environ 28 km de ce lieu d’intérêt : Eastbourne Miniature Steam Railway Adventure Park. Cet hébergement est installé à 1 km de : Plage de Hastings. Il propose un jardin et un parking privé gratuit.
Cet appartement comprend une télévision à écran plat. L’hébergement possède une kitchenette équipée d’un réfrigérateur, d’un micro-ondes et d’une plaque de cuisson. Il comprend également une douche, des articles de toilette gratuits et un sèche-cheveux.
Un petit-déjeuner continental est servi sur place.
Un service de location de vélos est disponible sur place.
hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: West Hill Retreat Seaview Balcony Loft Apartment in Hastings offers a garden and terrace with stunning sea views. Guests enjoy free WiFi, ensuring connectivity during their stay.
Comfortable Amenities: The apartment features a kitchenette, balcony, and private bathroom. Additional amenities include bathrobes, a work desk, and a dining area. Free on-site private parking is available.
Delightful Breakfast: A continental breakfast with juice and fruits is served daily. Private check-in and check-out services enhance the guest experience.
Prime Location: Located less than 1 km from Hastings Beach, the property is close to attractions such as Eastbourne Miniature Steam Railway Adventure Park and Glyndebourne Opera House. London Gatwick Airport is 79 km away.
hotels.description_es:
West Hill Retreat Seaview Balcony Loft Apartment & Free Offstreet Parking, que cuenta con vistas al mar, dispone de alojamiento con terraza y balcón a unos 28 km de Eastbourne Miniature Steam Railway Adventure Park. El alojamiento, que se encuentra a 11 min a pie de Playa de Hastings, ofrece jardín y parking privado gratis.
El apartamento tiene TV de pantalla plana. La zona de cocina cuenta con nevera, microondas y fogones, y hay ducha, artículos de aseo gratuitos y secador de pelo.
En el apartamento se puede disfrutar de un desayuno continental.
West Hill Retreat Seaview Balcony Loft Apartment & Free Offstreet Parking ofrece servicio de alquiler de bicicletas.
Muelle de Eastbourne está a 28 km del alojamiento, y Ópera de Glyndebourne está a 45 km.
hotels.description_pt:
Apresentando vista do mar, West Hill Retreat Seaview Balcony Loft Apartment & Free Offstreet Parking dispõe de acomodações com um terraço e varanda, a cerca de 28 km de Parque de Diversões Eastbourne Miniature Steam Railway. Situado a menos de 1 km de Hastings Beach, o alojamento fornece um jardim e estacionamento privado gratuito.
Este apartamento dispõe de uma televisão de ecrã plano. A kitchenette inclui um frigorífico, um micro-ondas e uma placa de fogão, e há chuveiro com produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos e um secador de cabelo.
West Hill Retreat Seaview Balcony Loft Apartment & Free Offstreet Parking disponibiliza pequeno-almoço continental aos seus hóspedes.
hotels.description_it:
Con vista sul mare, West Hill Retreat Seaview Balcony Loft Apartment & Free Offstreet Parking mette a disposizione un alloggio dotato di terrazza e balcone, a circa 28 km da Eastbourne Miniature Steam Railway Adventure Park. Situata a 1 km da Hastings Beach, la struttura prevede un giardino e il parcheggio privato gratuito.
Questo appartamento dispone di una TV a schermo piatto. L'angolo cottura comprende frigorifero, microonde e piano cottura, e l’alloggio dispone di doccia, set di cortesia e asciugacapelli.
Presso questo appartamento potrete gustare una colazione continentale.
Un servizio di noleggio biciclette è disponibile presso West Hill Retreat Seaview Balcony Loft Apartment & Free Offstreet Parking.

hotels.name: The Laindons
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Hastings, l’établissement The Laindons propose un salon commun et un bar, ainsi que des hébergements avec une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et une télévision à écran plat.
Des serviettes et du linge de lit moyennant des frais supplémentaires.
Un petit-déjeuner à la carte, anglais/irlandais complet ou végétarien est servi sur place.
Si vous souhaitez découvrir la région, vous aurez la possibilité de pratiquer la randonnée et le vélo dans les environs.
Vous séjournerez à respectivement 600 mètres et 28 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Plage de Hastings et Eastbourne Miniature Steam Railway Adventure Park. L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Londres Gatwick) est à 79 km.
Les couples apprécient particulièrement l'emplacement de cet établissement.
hotels.description_en:
Historic Setting: The Laindons in Hastings offers a unique stay within a historic building. The adults-only property features a bar and free WiFi, ensuring a comfortable and relaxing atmosphere.
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms include private bathrooms with walk-in showers, bathrobes, and fireplaces. Additional amenities include minibars, flat-screen TVs, and work desks, providing a cosy and convenient environment.
Delicious Breakfast: Guests enjoy a variety of breakfast options, including full English/Irish, vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free. Breakfast selections include warm dishes, juice, pancakes, and fruits, highly praised by visitors.
Local Attractions: Hastings Beach is a 7-minute walk away, while Eastbourne Miniature Steam Railway Adventure Park lies 28 km from the property.
hotels.description_es:
The Laindons se encuentra en Hastings y ofrece alojamiento con wifi gratis y TV de pantalla plana, además de salón de uso común y bar.
Para mayor comodidad, el alojamiento puede ofrecer toallas y ropa de cama por un suplemento.
En el alojamiento se puede disfrutar de un desayuno a la carta, inglés/irlandés completo o vegetariano.
Se puede descubrir la zona practicando senderismo o ciclismo en los alrededores.
Playa de Hastings está a 7 min a pie del alojamiento, y Eastbourne Miniature Steam Railway Adventure Park está a 28 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Londres - Gatwick) está a 79 km.
A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 10,0 para viajes de dos personas.

hotels.name: Middle House - Wensleydale, Yorkshire Dales
hotels.description_fr:
Dating back to the 19th century, Middle House - Wensleydale, Yorkshire Dales offers a bar and restaurant. Situated in the heart of Askrigg in Wensleydale, this family-run inn offers free Wi-Fi and free private parking.
 The Middle House - Wensleydale, Yorkshire Dales rooms include a TV, a hairdryer, and tea and coffee making facilities. The en suite bathrooms have a bath and a shower, along with complimentary toiletries.
With views over the beer garden, the bright Orangery Restaurant has a changing menu.  Guests can also enjoy bar meals and real ales in the traditional Yorkshire bar. The Middle House - Wensleydale, Yorkshire Dales Restaurant serves an à la carte menu, with dishes prepared using locally sourced produce.

hotels.name: Yorebridge House
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement Yorebridge House se trouve à Bainbridge, à 48 km de ce lieu d’intérêt : Lightwater Valley. Il propose un jardin, un restaurant, un bar et un parking privé gratuit. Il est installé à respectivement 21 km, 32 km et 38 km de : Forbidden Corner, Richmond Castle et Brough Castle. Cet établissement non-fumeurs se situe à 9,3 km de : Chutes d'Aysgarth.
L’établissement Yorebridge House sert un petit-déjeuner continental ou anglais/irlandais complet.
La région est prisée des amateurs de randonnée et de vélo, et cet hôtel 5 étoiles assure un service de location de vélos.
L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport international Teesside) est à 61 km.
Les couples apprécient particulièrement l'emplacement de cet établissement. Ils lui donnent la note de 10 pour un séjour à deux.
hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: Yorebridge House in Bainbridge offers 5-star comfort with family rooms, each featuring a private bathroom, bathrobes, and free toiletries. Guests enjoy amenities such as a work desk, TV, and wardrobe.
Dining and Leisure: The hotel boasts a restaurant, bar, and a beautiful garden. Additional facilities include bike hire and free on-site private parking. Breakfast options include continental, full English, and Irish.
Local Attractions: Located 9 km from Aysgarth Falls and 21 km from Forbidden Corner, Yorebridge House is also near Lightwater Valley Theme Park (47 km) and Richmond Castle (32 km). Teesside International Airport is 61 km away.
Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 10 for a two-person trip.
hotels.description_es:
Descubre cómo se sienten las estrellas con el mejor servicio en el Yorebridge House

El alojamiento está a unos 21 km de Forbidden Corner, a 32 km de Richmond Castle y a 38 km de Brough Castle. Este alojamiento libre de humo está a 9,3 km de Cascadas de Aysgarth.

Hay opciones continentales o inglesas/irlandesas de desayuno disponibles en el hotel.

La zona es ideal para practicar senderismo y ciclismo, y hay alquiler de bicicletas eneste hotel de 5 estrellas.

El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto internacional de Teesside) está a 61 km.

A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 10 para viajes de dos personas.

Comfortable Accommodations: The bed and breakfast features family rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and city views. Each room includes a kitchen, washing machine, and free WiFi.
Relaxing Facilities: Guests can enjoy spa facilities, a terrace, and a fitness room. Additional amenities include a yoga studio, beauty services, and a minimarket.
Convenient Services: The property provides a free airport shuttle service, 24-hour front desk, concierge, and daily housekeeping. Free WiFi is available throughout the stay.
hotels.description_es:
Luxury Rodrigo Residence Home se encuentra en Londres, a 13 min a pie de Estación de Paddington y a 2,1 km del centro, y ofrece alojamiento con aire acondicionado, wifi gratis y terraza.

Cada unidad cuenta con cocina totalmente equipada con mesa de comedor, TV de pantalla plana con canales vía satélite y baño privado con ducha, artículos de aseo gratuitos y secador de pelo. También se ofrece nevera, lavavajillas y horno, además de cafetera y hervidor.

En el bed and breakfast se sirve un desayuno inglés/irlandés completo.

Cerca del alojamiento hay puntos de interés como Hyde Park, Museo Madame Tussauds y The Serpentine. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Londres - City) está a 16 km, y el alojamiento ofrece servicio de traslado gratis para ir o volver del aeropuerto.
hotels.description_pt:
Em Londres, a 13 minutos a pé de Estação de Paddington e a 2,1 km do centro, Luxury Rodrigo Residence Home fornece acomodações com ar condicionado, acesso Wi-Fi gratuito e um terraço.

Cada unidade vem com uma cozinha totalmente equipada com mesa de refeições, televisão de ecrã plano com canais por satélite e uma casa de banho privativa com chuveiro, produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos e um secador de cabelo. Um frigorífico, uma máquina de lavar louça e forno também estão disponíveis, assim como uma máquina de café e uma chaleira.

Luxury Rodrigo Residence Home disponibiliza pequeno-almoço inglês/irlandês completo.

Luxury Rodrigo Residence Home tem vários pontos de interesse populares nas suas proximidades, incluindo Hyde Park, Museu de Cêra Madame Tussaud's e The Serpentine.
hotels.description_it:
A 1,1 km da Stazione di Londra Paddington e a 2,1 km dal centro di Londra, Luxury Rodrigo Residence Home prevede alloggi climatizzati con WiFi gratuito e una terrazza.

Ogni alloggio comprende una cucina con utensili e tavolo da pranzo, una TV a schermo piatto con canali satellitari e un bagno privato dotato di doccia, set di cortesia e asciugacapelli. In dotazione anche un frigorifero, una lavastoviglie e un forno, oltre a una macchina da caffè e un bollitore elettrico.

Questo bed and breakfast offre una colazione inglese/irlandese.

I luoghi di interesse più famosi nei dintorni di Luxury Rodrigo Residence Home includono Hyde Park, Museo delle Cere Madame Tussauds e Lago Serpentine.

hotels.name: Milestone Hotel Kensington
hotels.description_fr:
Idéalement situé entre les quartiers de Knightsbridge et de Kensington, dans le centre de Londres, le Milestone Hotel Kensington est un boutique hôtel 5 étoiles doté d'une piscine de nage à contre-courant, d'une salle de sport et d'un spa luxueux. Donnant sur le palais et les jardins de Kensington, cet hôtel intime se trouve à seulement 10 minutes à pied du verdoyant Hyde Park et du Royal Albert Hall.
Conçues individuellement, toutes les chambres affichent une élégance romantique et disposent de la climatisation, d'une réception ouverte 24h/24, ainsi que d'équipements technologiques modernes. Dotées d'un mobilier ancien, de fleurs fraîches et d'étoffes raffinées, les chambres luxueuses comprennent une télévision à écran plat avec un lecteur DVD, un bureau, un coin salon et un minibar.
hotels.description_en:
Ideally located between central London's Knightsbridge and Kensington districts, the boutique 5-star Milestone Hotel Kensington boasts a resistance pool, a fitness centre, and a luxurious spa. Overlooking Kensington Palace and Gardens, this intimate hotel is just 10 minutes' walk from leafy Hyde Park and the Royal Albert Hall.
Individually designed, each air-conditioned room offers a romantic elegance, a 24-hour front desk, and modern technology. With antique furnishings, fresh flowers, and fine fabrics, the luxurious rooms include a flat-screen TV with a DVD player, a work desk, seating area, and a mini-bar. With free toiletries, the en-suite bathroom has a hairdryer. The daily room service includes a complimentary treat, such as sweets, homemade cookies, seasonal fruits, or candles.
hotels.description_es:
Descubre cómo se sienten las estrellas con el mejor servicio en el Milestone Hotel Kensington
El Milestone Hotel Kensington es un hotel boutique de 5 estrellas, equipado con piscina contracorriente, centro de fitness y spa de lujo, y situado entre los céntricos distritos Knightsbridge y Kensington, en Londres. Este hotel de ambiente íntimo ofrece vistas al Palacio y los Jardines de Kensington y está a solo 10 minutos a pie del frondoso Hyde Park y del Royal Albert Hall.
Cada habitación presenta un diseño propio, elegante y romántico, y cuenta con aire acondicionado. También hay recepción 24 horas y todo tipo de tecnologías modernas.
hotels.description_pt:

Affacciato su Kensington Palace e sui giardini, questo accogliente hotel dista appena 10 minuti a piedi dal verdeggiante Hyde Park e dalla Royal Albert Hall.
Progettate individualmente, le camere sono climatizzate e caratterizzate da un'eleganza romantica. A vostra disposizione troverete una reception aperta 24 ore su 24 e tecnologie moderne.

hotels.name: The Peninsula London
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement The Peninsula London bénéficie d’un emplacement idéal dans le centre de Londres. Il propose un parking privé, un service d'étage ainsi que des hébergements dotés de la climatisation et d’une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite. Il comprend une terrasse et un bar, à respectivement 1,4 km et 800 mètres de : Harrods et Palais de Buckingham. Cet hôtel possède une piscine intérieure, un sauna, des animations en soirée et une réception ouverte 24h/24.
Tous les hébergements possèdent un bureau. Certains hébergements comprennent une cuisine équipée d’un réfrigérateur et d’un lave-vaisselle. Vous profiterez d'un coin salon et d’une télévision à écran plat avec les chaînes du câble.
hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: The Peninsula London offers a 5-star experience in London city centre. Guests enjoy spa facilities, an indoor swimming pool, sauna, sun terrace, restaurant, bar, and free WiFi.
Comfortable Amenities: Rooms feature air-conditioning, bathrobes, tea and coffee makers, hairdryers, work desks, seating areas, free toiletries, TVs, and wardrobes. Additional amenities include balconies, spa baths, kitchens, refrigerators, dishwashers, and interconnected rooms.
Dining Options: The family-friendly restaurant serves Chinese, British, international, and Cantonese cuisines. Meals include brunch, lunch, dinner, high tea, and cocktails, accommodating halal, kosher, vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, and dairy-free diets.
hotels.description_es:
Descubre cómo se sienten las estrellas con el mejor servicio en el The Peninsula London

The Peninsula London es un alojamiento bien ubicado en Londres que ofrece habitaciones con aire acondicionado y wifi gratis, parking privado y servicio de habitaciones. Ofrece terraza, restaurante y bar. El hotel dispone de piscina cubierta, sauna, ocio nocturno y recepción 24 horas.

En el hotel, todas las habitaciones están equipadas con escritorio. Algunas habitaciones tienen cocina con nevera y lavavajillas. Todas las unidades del alojamiento incluyen zona de estar y TV de pantalla plana con canales por cable.

Cerca del alojamiento hay puntos de interés como Harrods, Palacio de Buckingham y St James's Park. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Londres - City) está a 16 km.
hotels.description_pt:
Sinta-se como uma celebridade com o serviço de topo de The Peninsula London

Com uma boa localização no centro de Londres, The Peninsula London fornece quartos com ar condicionado, acesso Wi-Fi gratuito, estacionamento privado e serviço de quartos. A 16 minutos a pé de Galerias Comerciais Harrods e menos de 1 km de Palácio de Buckingham, o alojamento providencia apresenta um terraço e um bar. Este hotel dispõe de piscina interior, sauna, entretenimento noturno e uma receção aberta 24 horas.

No alojamento, todos os quartos têm secretária. Alguns quartos providenciam uma cozinha com um frigorífico e uma máquina de lavar louça. Os quartos do alojamento dispõem de área de estar e televisão de ecrã plano com canais por cabo.
hotels.description_it:
Vivi un'esperienza esclusiva con il servizio di prima classe presso The Peninsula London

In un ottimo punto nel centro di Londra, The Peninsula London prevede camere climatizzate con WiFi gratuito, parcheggio privato e servizio in camera. A 1,4 km da Harrods e 800 metri da Buckingham Palace, la struttura propone una terrazza e un bar. L'hotel mette a disposizione una piscina coperta, una sauna, un programma di intrattenimento serale e una reception 24 ore su 24.

Presso questo hotel, tutte le camere dispongono di una scrivania. Alcune camere presentano una cucina con un frigorifero e una lavastoviglie. Le camere presso The Peninsula London dispongono di un’area salotto e una TV a schermo piatto con canali via cavo.
